mapper.select: SELECT r.id FROM resumes r JOIN personal_profiles pp ON pp.id = r.personal_profile_id WHERE pp.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.is_primary DESC, r.updated_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT 1

WITH target_resume AS ( SELECT r.id, pp.career_years, pp.location, COALESCE(latest_eval.overall_score, 0) AS ai_score FROM resumes r JOIN personal_profiles pp ON pp.id = r.personal_profile_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ae.overall_score FROM ai_evaluations ae WHERE ae.resume_id = r.id ORDER BY ae.created_at DESC, ae.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_eval ON TRUE WHERE r.id = #{resumeId} ), job_skill_match AS ( SELECT jp.id AS job_post_id, COUNT(jps.id) AS required_skill_count, COUNT(rss.id) AS matched_skill_count, COUNT(rss.id) FILTER (WHERE jps.is_required = TRUE) AS matched_required_count, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT ss.name, ',' ORDER BY ss.name) FILTER (WHERE rss.id IS NOT NULL) AS matched_skills_csv FROM job_posts jp LEFT JOIN job_post_sap_skills jps ON jps.job_post_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = jps.sap_skill_id LEFT JOIN resume_sap_skills rss ON rss.sap_skill_id = jps.sap_skill_id AND rss.resume_id = #{resumeId} WHERE jp.status = 'OPEN' AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY jp.id ) SELECT jp.id, cp.company_name AS company, jp.location, jp.title, COALESCE(tags.tags_csv, '') AS tags_csv, COALESCE(jsm.matched_skills_csv, '') AS matched_skills_csv, jp.deadline, jp.salary_min, jp.salary_max, jp.salary_negotiable, LEAST(100, ROUND( CASE WHEN jsm.required_skill_count = 0 THEN 25 ELSE (jsm.matched_skill_count::DECIMAL / jsm.required_skill_count) * 55 END + CASE WHEN jp.min_career_years IS NULL AND jp.max_career_years IS NULL THEN 15 WHEN jp.min_career_years IS NULL AND tr.career_years <= jp.max_career_years THEN 15 WHEN jp.max_career_years IS NULL AND tr.career_years >= jp.min_career_years THEN 15 WHEN tr.career_years BETWEEN jp.min_career_years AND jp.max_career_years THEN 15 ELSE 4 END + CASE WHEN jp.location IS NULL OR tr.location IS NULL THEN 8 WHEN jp.location = tr.location THEN 10 ELSE 3 END + CASE WHEN jp.deadline IS NULL OR jp.deadline >= CURRENT_DATE THEN 5 ELSE 0 END + LEAST(10, tr.ai_score / 10) + LEAST(10, jsm.matched_required_count * 5) )) AS score FROM job_posts jp JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id CROSS JOIN target_resume tr JOIN job_skill_match jsm ON jsm.job_post_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT job_post_id, STRING_AGG(tag_name, ',' ORDER BY id) AS tags_csv FROM job_tags GROUP BY job_post_id ) tags ON tags.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jp.status = 'OPEN' AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM job_applications ja WHERE ja.user_id = #{userId} AND ja.job_post_id = jp.id AND ja.status != 'WITHDRAWN' ) ORDER BY score DESC, jsm.matched_required_count DESC, jp.created_at DESC, jp.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH target_job AS ( SELECT jp.id, jp.min_career_years, jp.max_career_years, jp.location FROM job_posts jp WHERE jp.id = #{jobPostId} AND jp.deleted_at IS NULL ), resume_skill_match AS ( SELECT r.id AS resume_id, COUNT(jps.id) AS required_skill_count, COUNT(rss.id) AS matched_skill_count, COUNT(rss.id) FILTER (WHERE jps.is_required = TRUE) AS matched_required_count, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT ss.name, ',' ORDER BY ss.name) FILTER (WHERE rss.id IS NOT NULL) AS matched_skills_csv FROM resumes r CROSS JOIN target_job tj LEFT JOIN job_post_sap_skills jps ON jps.job_post_id = tj.id LEFT JOIN sap_skills ss ON ss.id = jps.sap_skill_id LEFT JOIN resume_sap_skills rss ON rss.resume_id = r.id AND rss.sap_skill_id = jps.sap_skill_id WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.visibility IN ('PUBLIC', 'COMPANY_ONLY') GROUP BY r.id ) SELECT pp.user_id, r.id AS resume_id, u.name, pp.professional_title, pp.location, pp.career_years, r.title AS resume_title, COALESCE(rsm.matched_skills_csv, '') AS matched_skills_csv, LEAST(100, ROUND( CASE WHEN rsm.required_skill_count = 0 THEN 25 ELSE (rsm.matched_skill_count::DECIMAL / rsm.required_skill_count) * 60 END + CASE WHEN tj.min_career_years IS NULL AND tj.max_career_years IS NULL THEN 15 WHEN tj.min_career_years IS NULL AND pp.career_years <= tj.max_career_years THEN 15 WHEN tj.max_career_years IS NULL AND pp.career_years >= tj.min_career_years THEN 15 WHEN pp.career_years BETWEEN tj.min_career_years AND tj.max_career_years THEN 15 ELSE 4 END + CASE WHEN tj.location IS NULL OR pp.location IS NULL THEN 8 WHEN tj.location = pp.location THEN 10 ELSE 3 END + CASE WHEN pp.is_offer_available = TRUE THEN 5 ELSE 0 END + LEAST(10, COALESCE(latest_eval.overall_score, 0) / 10) + LEAST(10, rsm.matched_required_count * 5) )) AS score FROM resumes r JOIN personal_profiles pp ON pp.id = r.personal_profile_id JOIN users u ON u.id = pp.user_id CROSS JOIN target_job tj JOIN resume_skill_match rsm ON rsm.resume_id = r.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ae.overall_score FROM ai_evaluations ae WHERE ae.resume_id = r.id ORDER BY ae.created_at DESC, ae.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_eval ON TRUE WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.visibility IN ('PUBLIC', 'COMPANY_ONLY') AND pp.is_public = TRUE AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY score DESC, rsm.matched_required_count DESC, r.updated_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
